message:
feat(engine): add 31 deep integration tests for runtime images and operator diagnostics

- runtime_image_contract (17 tests): image kind/state/warm-start/integrity enums,
  Display impls, serde roundtrips, ALL constant coverage
- operator_diagnostic_contract (14 tests): failure kind enumeration, error code
  prefixes, severity ordering, user/operator impact classification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
